meta.purpose: Official HPA year-navigation result PDF locator candidates for PL Commentary Bank research.
meta.sourceBoundary: HPA official year navigation/result PDFs only. Candidate-only source index; do not treat as athlete confirmed history or event entries. Keep separate from athlete master data, confirmed histories, event entries, and research candidates.

events.eventName: 2025年 HPA公式 年別結果アーカイブ
events.notes: Official HPA year navigation result PDF. Use only as a source locator; do not promote athlete rows into confirmed histories without event-level and row-level confirmation.
